mapper.sql: p.id, p.name, p.description, p.status, p.team_id AS teamId, te.name AS teamName, COALESCE( ROUND( COUNT(CASE WHEN UPPER(REPLACE(COALESCE(t.status, ''), '-', '_')) = 'DONE' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(t.id), 0) ), 0 )::INTEGER AS progress, COUNT(t.id)::INTEGER AS taskCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN UPPER(REPLACE(COALESCE(t.status, ''), '-', '_')) = 'DONE' THEN 1 END)::INTEGER AS completedTaskCount, ( SELECT COUNT(*)::INTEGER FROM team_members tm2 WHERE tm2.team_id = p.team_id ) AS memberCount, p.deadline AS deadline, p.created_at AS createdAt

FROM projects p INNER JOIN teams te ON te.id = p.team_id LEFT JOIN tasks t ON t.project_id = p.id WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM team_members tm WHERE tm.team_id = p.team_id AND tm.user_id = #{userId} )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO teams (name, description, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{createdBy}, NOW())
INSERT INTO team_members (team_id, user_id, team_role, joined_at) VALUES (#{teamId}, #{userId}, #{teamRole}, NOW())
INSERT INTO projects (team_id, name, description, status, deadline, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{teamId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{status}, #{deadline}, #{createdBy}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE projects SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, deadline = #{deadline} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.description, p.status, p.team_id, te.name, p.deadline, p.created_at ORDER BY p.created_at DESC

SELECT
AND p.id = #{projectId} GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.description, p.status, p.team_id, te.name, p.deadline, p.created_at LIMIT 1
